props.ChoiceText: In a manuscript by daylight, you found the same image that had visited you in sleep.
props.ChoiceBio: A dream confirmed by text taught you that coincidence becomes exhausting once it starts repeating itself precisely.

0.TransitionText: Because a dream confirmed by text taught you that coincidence becomes exhausting once it starts repeating itself precisely, omens and correspondence pulled you toward astrology.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Astrologer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a dream confirmed by text taught you that coincidence becomes exhausting once it starts repeating itself precisely, confirmation only drew you deeper into occult study.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Occultist, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a dream confirmed by text taught you that coincidence becomes exhausting once it starts repeating itself precisely, occult certainty could turn into forbidden belief and a heretic's life.
2.TransitionPrompt: This certainty could carry you into heresy, but you may remain on your current path instead.
